concepts_used.title: K-Means 聚类
concepts_used.how_used: 使用 K-Means 聚类将过山车分为不同类别，用于后续缺失值填补（同类均值填补）。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we divide the sample into different categories by cluster analysis, and then we made up for the missing data by the mean value of those categories.

concepts_used.title: 熵权法
concepts_used.how_used: 采用熵权法确定各指标权重，基于数据离散程度客观赋权，构建综合评价模型。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We rank the roller coaster with entropy weight method.

concepts_used.title: 缺失值处理
concepts_used.how_used: 对缺失的速度和长度数据，使用同类中高度和长度最接近的过山车数据近似填补；对缺失的下降、持续时间等数据，按材质（木制/钢制）分类后取同类均值填补。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: For the missing data of speed and length, we use the 'approximate complement' method to estimate. ... For the missing data of drop, duration, G force and vertical angle, we use the mean value of the same type to fill in.

concepts_used.title: 异常值检测
concepts_used.how_used: 通过分类筛选发现并修正了三个过山车的类型错误数据（如 Terminator Salvation 从 Wood 改为 Sit down）。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: By classifying and screening the data ... there are three roller coasters involved. After checking on the Internet, the error data can be modified as shown in Table 2.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过剔除排名后 100 的过山车后重新计算排名，与原排名对比，验证结果的稳健性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we cut the last 100 roller coasters in our ranking, and calculate the ranking again, we find the result is very identical with our original ranking, which means our result is robustness.

concepts_used.title: 如何从数据中提取结论
concepts_used.how_used: 以新闻稿形式（News Release）非技术性地介绍算法、结果和 App，突出可读性和推广性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: At last, our team will write a one-page non-technical News Release describing our new algorithm, results, and app.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 明确列出 4 条假设（安全、票价、天气、正相关），并逐一给出合理性说明。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: No accident will happen ... Assumption 2: Our ranking system do not consider the price ... Assumption 3: Weather factors is not included ... Assumption 4: A rise in height, speed, length ... will all increase the riders’ excitement ...

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用 IMRaD 结构：Introduction, Methods (Data Processing, Evaluation Model), Results (Ranking, Comparison), Discussion (Sensitivity, App Design, Strengths/Weaknesses)。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 1. Introduction ... 2. Assumptions ... 3 Index Needed ... 4. Data Analysis and Processing ... 5. Evaluation ... 6. Sensitivity Analysis ... 7. Design for the App ... 8. Strength and Weakness ... 9. Conclusion
